title: taraxacum perfissum
intro: Taraxacum perfissum, also known as the perforate dandelion or hollow dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum perfissum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and improve overall liver function. Taraxacum perfissum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
